mapper.select: SELECT da.project_id AS projectId, 0 AS feeItemId, SUM(da.balance) AS depositBalance FROM asset_db.fin_deposit_account da WHERE da.is_deleted = 0 AND da.project_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY da.project_id
SELECT pa.project_id AS projectId, 0 AS feeItemId, SUM(pa.balance) AS prepayBalance FROM asset_db.fin_prepay_account pa WHERE pa.is_deleted = 0 AND pa.project_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pa.project_id
